name: Deferred - Old Friend - 2
description: Second returns for old friends from earlier chapters of a life.

results.description: [contact] The old friend from {origin} asked for shelter, and refusing would have cost you more than room.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [money -40] The friend from {origin} needed coin urgently, and you discovered that affection can still be expensive.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] Someone you trusted in {origin} spoke for you where their word still mattered.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [contact] The old friend brought news from {origin} that changed how you understood an earlier chapter of your life.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [social 1] A friend from {origin} praised you in company that had never heard your better qualities named so plainly.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [money -20] Friendship from {origin} survived, but only after you paid part of the cost of someone else's bad fortune.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [contact] Your old companion from {origin} asked little, but the little mattered enough to be remembered.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp] The returning friend from {origin} involved you in a difficulty that proved survivable but not simple.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [social 1] Someone from {origin} remembered your decency at exactly the moment your name needed help.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [contact] The old friend asked for a favor and became one in return, which is the nearest thing many friendships get to balance.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [money 1d6*20] A friend from {origin} repaid an old kindness in coin, goods, or warning just when any of those would serve.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The friendship begun in {origin} matured into a bond quieter and more reliable than either of you expected.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [money -30] What your old friend needed from {origin} proved inconvenient, but not helping would have lingered longer than the loss.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [contact] The old friendship from {origin} did not make your life easier, only less solitary, which can be worth more.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [social 1] Someone from {origin} vouched for you with a warmth that made others think better of you than they had intended.
results.name: old-friend-2

results.description: [contact] The friend who returned from {origin} stayed in your life afterward, which was reward and complication together.
results.name: old-friend-2
